metadata.description: AI-era plugins for systematic site analysis, API mapping, and developer workflows. Works with Claude Code, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cursor, and OpenCode.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Map any site's API surface — systematically. Detects tech stack, loads framework-specific guides, probes endpoints, runs OSINT, and produces structured persistent documentation.

plugins.name: namesmith
plugins.description: Find the right name for your project. Brand interview, AI generation across 7 archetypes, live availability + pricing via Cloudflare or Porkbun, and per-project names.md persistence.
